title: hieracium cinerellisquamum
intro: Hieracium cinerellisquamum, also known as a species of hawkweed, is a flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hieracium cinerellisquamum include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Hieracium cinerellisquamum can be made into infusions, decoctions, or salves, and are often used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
